title: Store Intelligence System
shortDescription: An AI-powered retail analytics platform utilizing computer vision to track customer movement and measure engagement.
description: Designed and developed an artificial intelligence retail analytics engine that processes security CCTV footage. Features include real-time customer movement tracking, heatmaps, store traffic analytics, and business insights to optimize product layouts and measure customer path engagement.
highlights: Real-time customer movement tracking and navigation paths
Interactive analytics dashboard displaying store heatmaps and visitor trends
Actionable business intelligence reporting to increase sales conversion

title: Secure Authentication Module
shortDescription: A robust user authentication backend module written in Java featuring relational database integrations and REST APIs.
description: Engineered a secure user sign-up and login credential processing module. Implemented encryption protocols, built REST API routing controllers for session tokens, and integrated structured SQL relational database management systems for user table configurations.
highlights: Encrypted user registration and database-backed login validation
RESTful API endpoints for easy frontend web integration
Structured SQL schemas mapping users, permissions, and audit logs
